blended.narrative: Tuckerman Ravine is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 388 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
